DISCOVERY, 302, AS TO PLAINTIFF TERRY KARKANEN'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DOCUMENT REQUESTS, AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS, WITHIN 30 DAYS AFTER THE DATE OF THE COURT'S ORDER, SPRING, INC., SHALL: 1.) PROVUDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOS. 40, 66, 67, 72-75, 82, 83 (AS TO OFFICERS AND EMPLOYEES OF SPRING, INC.), 85, 88, 91, AND 94-98, 2.) PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION NO. 58, 62-64, 66 AND 67; AND 3.) PRODUCE ALL UNPRIVILEGED DOCUMENTS IDENTIFIED IN FURTHER RESPONSE TO SAID REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records To Lauren Miller Peterson Connery Consulting And Brick Lane Public Relations And For Protective Order
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. DEFENDANT SPRIG, INC. Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records To Lauren Miller Peterson Connery Consulting And Brick Lane Public Relations And For Protective Order is taken off calendar. Notice of settlement was filed on April 28, 2016. (D302)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion For Leave To File 2nd Amended Complaint To Add One Additional Cause Of Action Against Defendant Sprig Inc
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TERRY KARKANEN'S Motion For Leave To File 2nd Amended Complaint To Add One Additional Cause Of Action Against Defendant Sprig Inc. is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Document Requests, And To Produce Documents, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MATTHEW J. OREBIC, ESQ., Tel No. 510-334-5333 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. KELLY FINLEY, ESQ. of Redwood Legal Group, Tel No. 415-757-0430 appearing for Defendant Sprig, Inc.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court rules as follows: As to PLAINTIFF TERRY KARKANEN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Document Requests, And To Produce Documents, And Request For Sanctions, within 30 days after the date of the Court's order, Spring, Inc., shall: 1.) Provude further responses to Special Interrogatories Nos. 40, 66, 67, 72-75, 82, 83 (as to officers and employees of Spring, Inc.), 85, 88, 91, and 94-98, 2.) Provide further responses to Requests for Production No. 58, 62-64, 66 and 67; and 3.) Produce all unprivileged documents identified in further response to said requests for production. Said motion is otherwise denied. Court to prepare and send out a formal order to parties. Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
